document:
Orbit Bay Platform Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 15 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@orbitbay.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 5 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: What number of days is the refund deadline?
